sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: I'm really into rock music right now.
Oh, cool! What kind of rock music do you prefer?
I'm really into alternative and grunge.
Nice! Some of my favorite alternative and grunge bands are Nirvana, Pearl Jam, and Soundgarden.
Oh, I love those bands too!
Awesome! Have you checked out any newer bands in the same genre?
Yeah, I've been listening to some newer bands like Wolf Alice and Foals.
Great choices! I've heard good things about both of them.
Thanks! What about you? What kind of music do you like?
I'm a big fan of hip-hop and R&B.
That's cool! Who are some of your favorite artists in those genres?
Some of my favorites are Kendrick Lamar, J.
Cool! I've heard he's an amazing artist.
Yes, definitely. And another artist I really like is The Weeknd.
Oh, I know him! He's got some really great songs.
Absolutely. Have you listened to his latest album, "After Hours"?
I haven't yet, but I've been meaning to.
You're in for a treat then!
Great! I'll definitely have to check it out soon.
No problem! And I'd be interested in hearing about any new alternative or grunge bands you come across.
Sure thing! I'll let you know if I find any good ones.
That would be great! And I'll definitely keep you in mind if I come across any hip-hop or R&B artists you might like.
You're welcome! It's always fun to discover new music together.
Definitely! It's great to have someone to share your music interests with.
Absolutely. I agree. And there's always so much great music out there to explore.
Yeah, the world of music is so vast and diverse.
It really is. I feel like there's always something new to discover.
